# Pipes, Redirection, and the Danger Chapter

<!-- STUB (Phase 0). Scope: PLAN.md Section 8, Ch 6. EXEMPLAR (Phase 2,
     G2 style). stdin/out/err, redirection, |; first-class DANGER
     (rm -rf, > clobbering, curl | sh + supply-chain/PATH-hijack).
     + Quoting / globs / null-safety taught as CORE (BEGINNER tier). -->
